exitGateCoverage.gate: Every persisted object has a versioned schema.
Every mutating operation is classified as plan/commit or internal maintenance.
No security-relevant normative decision remains deferred.

claims.claim: Daemon operating-system readability is not client-session authorization.

testEvidence.name: daemon-readable but session-unauthorized path is refused

supportedPlatformPosture.linux: requires constrained traversal beneath authorized root or authorized handle
supportedPlatformPosture.darwin: requires authorized handle or in-sandbox fallback when containment cannot be proven
supportedPlatformPosture.windows: requires reparse-aware traversal or authorized handle

claims.claim: workspaceViewId is stable visibility, not authority.

testEvidence.name: knowledge of workspaceViewId without valid visibilityContext grants no access

supportedPlatformPosture.all: host grant or authorized handle required for every use

claims.claim: The object read is authorized after it is opened, not merely after pathname canonicalization.

testEvidence.name: symlink, mount, and reparse traversal cannot escape the authorized root

supportedPlatformPosture.linux: openat2-style beneath/in-root semantics or handle transfer
supportedPlatformPosture.darwin: handle transfer or fail closed when containment cannot be proven

claims.claim: Persisted registry, cache, operation, receipt, exclusion, and history records are versioned and keep state axes separate.

supportedPlatformPosture.all: versioned JSON-compatible records with unknown-major refusal or quarantine

claims.claim: User-visible mutations require immutable plan/commit with approval and precondition revalidation.

testEvidence.name: plan digest changes when resource targets or preconditions change

supportedPlatformPosture.all: single commit path for specialized and generic mutation commands

claims.claim: Multi-record mutations are journaled, idempotent, and generation-fenced.

testEvidence.name: restart during prepared operation reconciles or quarantines partial state

claims.claim: Scope algebra can return unknown, and unknown is never an optimistic authorization result.

supportedPlatformPosture.all: unknown denies authority, misses cache, or returns insufficient scope

claims.claim: Derived artifacts are scoped by input provenance, visibility context, policy, and incarnation.

testEvidence.name: narrow view cannot receive aggregate artifact created by broader view

supportedPlatformPosture.all: cache hit revalidates current authorization and artifact provenance

claims.claim: Historical answers report spatial and temporal completeness and refuse unsupported claims.

testEvidence.name: docs-only query cannot produce repository-wide dead-symbol claim

supportedPlatformPosture.all: history output is scoped to authorized binding and coverage

claims.claim: Same-path replacement cannot attach stale cache or history to a new incarnation without explicit validation.

supportedPlatformPosture.all: heuristics may be suspect or unknown and durable attachment blocks on uncertainty

claims.claim: Repo-local portable history is hostile input and never invokes ambient Git behavior.

testEvidence.name: repo-local store cannot use alternates, hooks, replacement refs, lazy fetch, config includes, helpers, or network

supportedPlatformPosture.all: validated object store reader with sanitized environment and no network
